title: Motif vs. Graph-Stats Unique Information Decomposition
summary: Demo notebook for Unique Information Decomposition of motif-level vs graph-level features across 64 Neuronpedia attribution graphs (8 per domain, 8 domains). Runs McFadden R² variance decomposition with 1000 bootstraps, residualized clustering with 1000 permutation tests, domain-normalized intensity analysis, conditional mutual information, and canonical correlation analysis. Produces a 4-panel visualization showing variance decomposition, per-feature MI retention, canonical correlations, and clustering NMI by K. Full original parameters fit within the 5-minute runtime limit (~123s processing).
